name: FocusStreak: Stay Focus Daily
shortDesc: Boost your study sessions with a simple focus timer and streak tracker
longDescription:
Are you tired of getting distracted while studying? Do you struggle to stay focused and motivated? FocusStreak is here to help. This powerful productivity app is designed to help students like you stay on track, build better study habits, and achieve your goals.

What is FocusStreak?

FocusStreak is a simple yet effective focus timer and study streak tracker that helps you stay consistent and motivated. With its clean and intuitive interface, you can easily start a focus session, track your progress, and build a streak of productive days.

How it Works

Using FocusStreak is easy. Simply open the app, set a timer for the amount of time you want to focus, and start studying. The app will help you stay on track by blocking distractions and keeping you motivated with a visual streak system. You can also track your progress over time and see how your focus and productivity improve.

Benefits of Using FocusStreak

So why should you use FocusStreak? Here are just a few benefits of using this powerful productivity app:

  • Improved focus and concentration: By using a focus timer and streak tracker, you can stay on track and avoid distractions.
  • Increased motivation: The visual streak system will keep you motivated to study and stay focused.
  • Better time management: FocusStreak helps you prioritize your study sessions and make the most of your time.
  • Offline access: You can use FocusStreak even without an internet connection, making it perfect for studying on the go.
  • Lightweight and efficient: The app is under 15 MB, making it easy to download and use on your device.

Who is FocusStreak For?

FocusStreak is perfect for anyone who wants to improve their focus and productivity, including:

  • School and college students
  • Self-learners and exam preppers
  • Anyone who wants to improve their time management skills

Why Choose FocusStreak?

So why should you choose FocusStreak over other productivity apps? Here are just a few reasons:

  • Simple and easy to use: FocusStreak has a clean and intuitive interface that makes it easy to get started.
  • Effective: The app's focus timer and streak tracker are designed to help you stay on track and motivated.
  • Customizable: You can adjust the timer and settings to fit your needs and study style.

faq.q: Is FocusStreak free to use?
faq.a: Yes, FocusStreak is free to download and use, with no ads or in-app purchases.

faq.q: Can I use FocusStreak offline?
faq.a: Yes, FocusStreak works offline, so you can use it even without an internet connection.

faq.q: Is my data safe with FocusStreak?
faq.a: Yes, FocusStreak takes your privacy seriously and does not collect or share any personal data.

faq.q: Is FocusStreak compatible with my device?
faq.a: FocusStreak is compatible with most Android devices, but if you have any issues, please contact our support team.

faq.q: How does FocusStreak compare to other productivity apps?
faq.a: FocusStreak is designed to be simple and easy to use, with a focus on helping you build better study habits and stay motivated.

faq.q: Can I use FocusStreak for work or other activities?
faq.a: Yes, FocusStreak can be used for any activity that requires focus and concentration, not just studying.

faq.q: How do I get started with FocusStreak?
faq.a: Simply download and install the app, then open it and start a focus session. You can adjust the timer and settings to fit your needs.

faq.q: What if I have questions or need support?
faq.a: You can contact our support team through the app or by visiting our website.

name: AstroPrerna AI Chat & Rashifal
shortDesc: Get your personalized astrology companion with instant Kundli, daily Rashifal, and AI-powered guidance
longDescription:
AstroPrerna is your complete astrology companion that blends ancient Vedic wisdom with modern AI. With just your date of birth, you can unlock a world of astrological insights and guidance. Our app is designed to provide you with a personalized experience, helping you navigate life's challenges and opportunities with confidence.

Discover Your Birth Chart

Enter your date of birth and get your personalized Janam Kundali instantly. No complex inputs are required - AstroPrerna does all the work for you. Explore your life path, personality traits, and planetary influences to gain a deeper understanding of yourself and your place in the world.

AI Astrology Chat

Talk to our smart AI astrologer anytime and ask anything - career, love, health, money, relationships. Get detailed, personalized answers powered by AI, just like having a personal Jyotishi in your pocket. Our AI astrologer is trained on ancient Vedic principles and modern astrological practices, providing you with accurate and reliable guidance.

Love and Relationships

Curious about your relationship? Enter both partners' details and get an instant Love Compatibility Score. Discover your emotional connection, romantic potential, and bond strength. Our love match feature is based on Vedic astrology principles, providing you with insights into your compatibility and helping you build a stronger, more fulfilling relationship.

Daily Rashifal

Get fresh daily horoscope for all 12 zodiac signs every day. Know what the day holds for you in love, career, health, and finances. Plan your day with cosmic guidance and make informed decisions to achieve your goals. Our daily Rashifal is updated regularly, ensuring you stay connected to the celestial rhythms and patterns that influence your life.

Future Predictions

AstroPrerna reveals upcoming opportunities, challenges, and planetary influences on your life based on your unique birth chart and Vedic astrology. Our future predictions feature helps you prepare for what's to come, providing you with valuable insights and guidance to navigate life's twists and turns.

Why AstroPrerna?

We believe that astrology should be accessible to everyone, which is why we've designed AstroPrerna to be clean, fast, and easy to use. Our app is free to use, and we're committed to providing you with the most accurate and reliable astrological guidance possible. Whether you follow Vedic astrology deeply or are just curious about your future, AstroPrerna brings the wisdom of the cosmos to your fingertips.

What Sets Us Apart

At AstroPrerna, we're dedicated to providing you with a unique and personalized experience. Our app is designed to help you connect with the celestial rhythms and patterns that influence your life, providing you with valuable insights and guidance to achieve your goals. With AstroPrerna, you can:

  • Get instant access to your birth chart and personalized astrological insights
  • Ask our AI astrologer anything and receive detailed, personalized answers
  • Discover your love compatibility score and build a stronger, more fulfilling relationship
  • Stay connected to the daily Rashifal and plan your day with cosmic guidance
  • Prepare for upcoming opportunities and challenges with our future predictions feature
  • Enjoy a clean, fast, and easy-to-use interface that's free to use

Download AstroPrerna today and let the stars guide your journey!

Astrology for Everyone

Whether you're a seasoned astrology enthusiast or just starting to explore the world of Vedic astrology, AstroPrerna is the perfect companion for you. Our app is designed to be accessible and easy to use, providing you with a wealth of information and guidance to help you navigate life's challenges and opportunities. With AstroPrerna, you can:

  • Learn about the 12 zodiac signs and their characteristics
  • Discover the principles of Vedic astrology and how they apply to your life
  • Get personalized insights and guidance from our AI astrologer
  • Stay connected to the celestial rhythms and patterns that influence your life
  • Build a stronger, more fulfilling relationship with our love match feature

AstroPrerna is more than just an astrology app - it's a personalized guide to help you achieve your goals and live a more fulfilling life. Download AstroPrerna today and start your journey to a brighter, more cosmic future!

name: CGPA & GPA Calculator
shortDesc: Calculate GPA, CGPA, and grade percentages instantly with GradeAstra
longDescription:
Welcome to GradeAstra, your ultimate academic companion for calculating GPA, CGPA, and converting your grades to percentage. As a student in India, you know how crucial it is to stay on top of your academic performance. With GradeAstra, you can do just that - and more.

What is GradeAstra?

GradeAstra is a user-friendly app designed to help school students, college students, and university scholars track their academic progress with ease. The app is simple, fast, and beautiful, making it a must-have for any student looking to stay ahead of the curve.

Key Benefits of Using GradeAstra

So, why should you choose GradeAstra over other GPA calculators? Here are just a few benefits of using our app:

  • Instant calculations: Get your GPA, CGPA, and grade percentages in seconds.
  • Easy to use: Our intuitive interface makes it simple for you to input your grades and get your results.
  • Accurate calculations: Our app uses the latest formulas and algorithms to ensure your calculations are accurate and reliable.
  • Customizable: Choose from different grading systems and scales to suit your needs.
  • Offline access: Use GradeAstra even without an internet connection.
  • Beautiful design: Our app is designed to be visually appealing and easy on the eyes.

How GradeAstra Works

Using GradeAstra is straightforward. Simply download and install the app, then follow these steps:

  • Input your grades: Enter your grades for each subject, and our app will calculate your GPA and CGPA.
  • Choose your grading system: Select from different grading systems, including percentage, GPA, and CGPA.
  • Get your results: View your calculated GPA, CGPA, and grade percentages instantly.

Why Choose GradeAstra?

At GradeAstra, we're committed to helping you achieve your academic goals. Here are just a few reasons why you should choose our app:

  • Expertise: Our team of experts has years of experience in developing educational apps.
  • Authority: We're a trusted name in the education sector, with a reputation for delivering high-quality apps.
  • Trust: We value your privacy and security, and our app is designed to protect your data.

Real-World Applications of GradeAstra

GradeAstra is more than just a GPA calculator - it's a tool that can help you in real-life situations. For example, you can use our app to:

  • Track your progress: Monitor your academic performance over time, and identify areas where you need to improve.
  • Set goals: Use our app to set targets for your GPA and CGPA, and work towards achieving them.
  • Compare yourself: Compare your grades with your friends and classmates, and see how you stack up.

Conclusion

In conclusion, GradeAstra is the ultimate academic companion for students in India. With its user-friendly interface, instant calculations, and customizable features, it's the perfect tool for anyone looking to track their academic progress. So why wait? Download GradeAstra today and start achieving your academic goals!

faq.q: Is GradeAstra free to use?
faq.a: Yes, GradeAstra is completely free to download and use.

faq.q: Can I use GradeAstra offline?
faq.a: Yes, GradeAstra can be used offline, without an internet connection.

faq.q: Is my data secure with GradeAstra?
faq.a: Yes, we take your privacy and security seriously, and our app is designed to protect your data.

faq.q: Is GradeAstra compatible with my device?
faq.a: GradeAstra is compatible with most Android devices, and can be downloaded from the Google Play Store.

faq.q: How accurate are the calculations in GradeAstra?
faq.a: Our app uses the latest formulas and algorithms to ensure accurate and reliable calculations.

faq.q: Can I use GradeAstra to track my progress over time?
faq.a: Yes, GradeAstra allows you to track your academic progress over time, and identify areas where you need to improve.

faq.q: How does GradeAstra compare to other GPA calculators?
faq.a: GradeAstra is a unique app that offers a range of features and benefits that set it apart from other GPA calculators, including its user-friendly interface, customizable grading systems, and offline access.

faq.q: What types of grading systems does GradeAstra support?
faq.a: GradeAstra supports a range of grading systems, including percentage, GPA, and CGPA, and allows you to customize the grading system to suit your needs.

name: Lofiga: Lofi Slow Reverb Maker
shortDesc: Turn songs Lofi, Slow Reverb & Vintage. 10+ Presets, Atmosphere & WAV/M4A export
longDescription:
Imagine being able to transform any song into your perfect vibe, with just one tap. Welcome to Lofiga, the ultimate lofi music maker and slow reverb creator for Android. This innovative app is designed to help you unlock the full potential of your music, whether you're looking for a nostalgic lofi sound, dreamy slow reverb, or a retro vintage feel.

What is Lofiga?

Lofiga is an audio effects studio that allows you to transform any song into stunning audio styles. With its user-friendly interface and powerful features, you can easily create your own unique soundscapes and moods. Whether you're a music enthusiast, a content creator, or simply someone who loves to relax to music, Lofiga is the perfect app for you.

Key Benefits

So, what makes Lofiga special? For starters, it's incredibly easy to use. Simply select a song from your music library, choose your desired audio style, and let Lofiga work its magic. You can also customize your sound to your heart's content, with a range of adjustable settings and effects.

Features and Functionality

But what really sets Lofiga apart is its impressive range of features and functionality. With Lofiga, you can:

  • Transform any song into stunning lofi audio styles
  • Create dreamy slow reverb effects
  • Add a retro vintage feel to your music
  • Customize your sound with adjustable settings and effects
  • Save and share your creations with others
  • Access a vast library of user-generated content and inspiration

How Does it Work?

So, how does Lofiga actually work its magic? The app uses advanced audio processing algorithms to analyze and transform your music in real-time. This means that you can hear the effects of your changes as you make them, allowing you to tweak and refine your sound to perfection.

Getting Started

Getting started with Lofiga is easy. Simply download and install the app, then follow the in-app tutorials and guides to learn the ropes. You can also explore the app's many features and settings to discover new and creative ways to use Lofiga.

Why Choose Lofiga?

So, why should you choose Lofiga over other music transformation apps? For starters, Lofiga offers an unparalleled level of quality and customization. With its advanced audio processing algorithms and user-friendly interface, you can create truly unique and stunning soundscapes that reflect your personal style and mood.

Join the Lofiga Community

But Lofiga is more than just an app - it's a community of like-minded music enthusiasts and creators. With Lofiga, you can connect with others who share your passion for music and audio production, and discover new and inspiring content to fuel your creativity.

name: NVIDIA NIM API Speed Test
shortDesc: Test NVIDIA NIM API speed in real-time. Compare 100+ AI models — LLM, code, image, embedding. Check TTFT, tokens/sec, latency.
longDescription:
Benchmark NVIDIA NIM API speed in real-time with our free online tool. Compare over 100 AI models including Meta Llama, DeepSeek, Qwen, Mistral, NVIDIA Nemotron, and more. Measure time to first token (TTFT), tokens per second, and total API latency to find the fastest model for your use case.

What is NVIDIA NIM API?

NVIDIA NIM (NVIDIA Inference Microservices) provides performance-optimized AI inference through an OpenAI-compatible API endpoint. It offers a generous free tier with 40+ models and no credit card required.

How to Use This Speed Test Tool

Simply enter your NVIDIA NIM API key from build.nvidia.com, browse available models, and click Test Speed on any model. The tool measures TTFT, tokens/sec, and total response time in real-time. You can also test embedding models and image generation models.

Key Features

  • Real-time speed benchmarking for 100+ AI models
  • Model category filters: LLM, Code, Image, Video, Embedding, Multimodal, Healthcare
  • Live health checks — only shows models currently available
  • Batch testing — test all visible models at once
  • Privacy-first — your API key stays in your browser only

faq.q: Is NVIDIA NIM API Speed Test free?
faq.a: Yes, this tool is completely free. You need a free NVIDIA NIM API key from build.nvidia.com.

faq.q: Is my API key safe?
faq.a: Your API key is stored only in your browser's sessionStorage and is never sent to our servers. It is automatically cleared when you close the tab.

faq.q: What models can I test?
faq.a: You can test any model available on NVIDIA NIM — LLMs, code generation, embedding, image generation, and more. The tool runs a health check to show only currently live models.

faq.q: How do I get a NVIDIA NIM API key?
faq.a: Visit build.nvidia.com, create a free NVIDIA Developer account, verify your phone number, and generate an API key that starts with nvapi-.

faq.q: What does TTFT mean?
faq.a: TTFT stands for Time to First Token — how quickly the API starts streaming a response. Lower TTFT means more responsive AI applications.
